song.title: All In All
song.author: Dennis Jergan
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G D Em 1) You are my strength when I am weak. . G C You are the treasure that I seek. . Dsus D G D You are my all in all. .G D Em Seeking you as a precious jewel, . G C Lord to give up I'd be a fool. . Dsus D G D You are my all in all.
[C] .G D Em G C D G D Chorus Jesus, lamb of God, |Worthy is your name. .G D Em G C D G D Jesus, lamb of God, |Worthy is your name.
[V2] 2) Taking my sin, my cross, my shame, Rising again I bless your name. You are my all in all. When I fall down you pick me up. When I am dry you fill my cup. You are my all in all.
